text: About 71% of Earth's surface is covered by water.
The human body is roughly 60% water by mass.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
A triangle has 3 sides and its interior angles sum to 180 degrees.
There are 24 hours in a day and 60 minutes in an hour.
A circle is 360 degrees all the way around.
Light travels at about 300,000 kilometres per second in a vacuum.
The freezing point of water is 0 degrees Celsius at standard pressure.
A week has 7 days and a year has 12 months.
Sound travels at roughly 343 metres per second through air at room temperature.
A standard deck of playing cards has 52 cards.
There are 100 centimetres in a metre and 1000 metres in a kilometre.
A square has 4 equal sides and 4 right angles.
The Earth completes one rotation on its axis in about 24 hours.
Normal human body temperature is around 37 degrees Celsius.
Water is composed of 2 hydrogen atoms and 1 oxygen atom.
There are 1000 grams in a kilogram.
